entry.title: Re: Which UI5 LTS Version will be the next one available...
entry.content:
Hi @Margot ,

thanks for the quick answer!

Perhaps this could be documented on https://ui5.sap.com/#/topic/91f021426f4d1014b6dd926db0e91070 esp. that 1.136 will be a LTS version, because from the history at https://ui5.sap.com/versionoverview.html with 1.84/1.96/1.108/1.120 readers would expect 1.132 and "only two SAPUI5 versions per year are shipped as part of the SAP_UI component" will not be true for 2024 as then no SAPUI5 version will be shipped this year with SAP_UI. Also https://ui5.sap.com/docs/maintenancestrategy.pdf should be updated.

Regards,

  Wolfgang

entry.title: Re: DRF - Business Partner replication - disable confirma...
entry.content:
You are referring to the "MDG_KM_MAINTAIN" key mapping web service in this replication, right? We don't use it in this replication.

The number of business partners is approximately 30,000 per day. This is a change replication.

The PACK_SIZE_BULK is set to 1 because of error handling. We cannot restart the messages in srt_moni; if an error occurs for one business partner, the other business partners within the message are also not processed. It is easier to figure out which business partner has an error and resend it.

entry.title: Re: Footnote in adobe form
entry.content:
I have attached an image to explain the expected functionality.

At the end of the page I created a dedicated area for viewing notes

entry.title: xsls file from AL11 convert to internal table in SAP ABAP
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I need to convert .xsls file from AL11 to internal table. I'm using FM - EPS2_GET_DIRECTORY_LISTING to get the files located in one particular folder (AL11). Converting the file into internal table by using the below code. 

TRY.
DATA(lo_xlsx) = NEW cl_fdt_xl_spreadsheet( document_name = lv_file1
xdocument = lv_xls_xstr ).
lo_xlsx->if_fdt_doc_spreadsheet~get_worksheet_names(
IMPORTING
worksheet_names = DATA(lt_excel) ).
CATCH cx_fdt_excel_core.
CLEAR lv_excel.
ENDTRY.

IF lv_excel = abap_true.
CLEAR: lt_dummyfile.
* nested loop required here. because, AL11 will contains multiple files. 1st loop will contain these recores.
* Excel file will contain multiple tabs. for this one also loop reqired.
FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_data_tab> type STANDARD TABLE.
LOOP AT lt_excel INTO DATA(ls_excel).
DATA(lo_ref) = lo_xlsx->if_fdt_doc_spreadsheet~get_itab_from_worksheet( ls_excel ) .
ASSIGN lo_ref->* TO <fs_data_tab>.
MOVE-CORRESPONDING <fs_data_tab> TO lt_dummyfile.
ENDLOOP.
ENDIF.

 

data converting to internal table but currency column is not converting properly (a few records in currency column) 
for example, 0.07 is the value in the file. but it is converting like 7.000000009A-1. Can you please let me know why it is converting like this. How to convert this type of value normal currency.

 

Thanks & Regards
Sathish

entry.title: Re: No PMR - Production material request EWM created
entry.content:
"WM request indicator is 2 in the profile and assigned to the material."

And you find the profile in the production order?

Have you tried to manually trigger the staging? You wrote that you simulated it, but what happens if you choose to execute the staging from PP?

Brgds

Juergen

entry.title: Re: How to prevent users from submitting data within the...
entry.content:
Hi @Barbar , hope you're doing great.

Based on what you've shared, if you need to compare current date against any other parameter, I suggest you to consider "Day Of Month" function, as my attached image illustrates.

In this example, I've created a custom MDF, and my onSave rule for this object is checking if the current date is after 15th day of the month. In case the validation is successful, then an error message is displayed.

Hope this can help you.

Regards.

Thiago Eva

entry.title: Re: Which UI5 LTS Version will be the next one available...
entry.content:
Thanks for your suggestion and feedback, @WRoeckelein.
The documentation would be not the appropriate place to publish information about the next LTS. As said, these are current plans and not an official statement.
However, I will take this point with me and discuss with the product team the possibility and appropriate method of publishing this information.
You are correct in pointing out that the previous maintenance strategy is no longer applicable, and we will update the relevant chapter in the documentation as well as the slide deck to reflect the changes.

entry.title: Re: No PMR - Production material request EWM created
entry.content:
"the status of Component in the production order is released and prod. material request created "

Does the status of the component say that a PMR is created? That would be new to me (but I never paid attention to that).

Does your distribution model include PMR?

Brgds

Juergen

entry.title: Enter does not work when I deploy my RAP app in Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
Hello,

I have the issue when Enter does not work when I deploy my RAP app in Fiori Launchpad.

When I preview from the service binding preview option, the enter button refreshes the content of my Facet. But when I deploy my app in Fiori Launchpad and view it, the enter button is not reacting. It does not do the refresh when I press enter.

Am I missing something here?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: How to develop Fiori List Report based on CDS View wi...
entry.content:
I would recommend to use visual studio code and install the Fiori tooling using the extension pane.

you can use BTP trial to use business application studio but this should not be used for developing productive apps:

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hcp-create-trial-account..html

Free tier is also an option but this will not stay for personal usage: https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/trial-accounts-and-free-tier

entry.title: Re: How to develop Fiori List Report based on CDS View wi...
entry.content: Vscode with fiori tooling tutorial: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/fiori-tools-vscode-setup..html

entry.title: Missing information for DB Lake credentials while creating instance for SAP HANA cloud.
entry.content:
We are creating a remote SAP HANA database for populating staging tables for Data Migration in SAP S/4 HANA cloud.

While creating an instance for SAP HANA cloud using HANA-Cloud connection free service, we are asked to enter datalakeID , datalakePassword and datalakeUser. We are unaware what credentials needs to be filled here. 

Could you please help us with the detailed steps to create the instance ?

I have attached the JSON structure screenshot wherein we are asked to put the database lake credentials.

entry.title: Re: Assigning alias system to OData services
entry.content:
In my book the system alias name should be stable accross the landscape e.g. "ERP" or "HCM". By changing the actual RFC destination behind that system alias you cope with the different environements between DEV, QAS, PRD

No need for any opening of a system then, as maintaining the alias itself has "current settings" active

However, if you need to change the alias for a service deliberately, say to point just one specific service to a sandbox environment without tempering with other services, one approach would be to do this via default alias. For this you would then need to either have the system open or apply the "current settings" to the SPRO "Assign SAP System Aliases to OData Service" (/IWFND/V_MGDEAM) (maybe only do this in QAS).

entry.title: SAP IBP Planner workspace, workbook variant filtering
entry.content:
Hi experts,
Do you know if it's possible, in Planner Workspace, to define workbook variant filters with dynamic/cascading behavior, i.e., where the values selected for one attribute limit the list of values for another attribute filter?

Thanks.

entry.title: Customer Master Delivery Block Prevents Delivery Creation – How to Only Block Goods Issue?
entry.content:
My client has requested the possibility to set a block on a customer that allows the creation of sales orders and deliveries, but prevents goods issue posting in the delivery.

I have already created a delivery block (IMG > Logistic Execution > Shipping > Deliveries > Define Reasons for Blocking in Shipping) and flagged only the "Goods Issue" box. When applied directly to the delivery, the block works correctly.

However, when I assign the block at the customer master data level (Customer Master > Sales Data > Shipping Tab > Delivery Block for Sales Area), the sales order can be created, but I am unable to create the delivery. Whether I try through VL10C or VL01N, the delivery cannot be created because the customer/order has the delivery block applied (even though, as mentioned earlier, only the "Goods Issue" flag is selected).

It seems that, by standard, in S4H, assigning a delivery block in customer master data or in the sales order prevents delivery creation altogether, regardless of the flags set in customizing.

Do you have any suggestions on how to manage this request?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Need help with printing of an https:// URL in backgro...
entry.content: Hi Ulrich, Thank you very much for the guidance. I went through the blog and it is very well explained. However, as per my understanding from the blog, the input to the SAP Business Connecter can also be an HTML file. While in our case, the data is over a webpage contains HTML, CSS and Java Script functions. Please suggest if HTML file with CSS and Java Script functions could pose a challenge. In the meantime, I am sharing this information with Middleware Teams. Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content: docker pull sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial:ABAPTRIAL_2022_SP01

entry.title: Profit center for an entry on an account type "Costs or expenses"
entry.content:
Hi,

We have some journal entries on the some accounts type "Costs or expenses" which are linked only to a profit center and not to a cost center.

For example journal entries type Goods Receipt from Supplier

D6. No cost center but a profit center

C7. same profit center.

Why is the system indicating a Profit Center instead of leaving it blank ?

As it is an account type "Costs or expenses" we were not expecting any profit center indication.

Thanks

Amanda

entry.title: Re: Footnote in adobe form
entry.content: Hmmm, not exactly sure how you would detect that the associated bit of information is in superscript. It would be more appropriate to have the text maintained as a full long text that includes the footnotes, and apply a smartstyle for the formatting requirements.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic SemanticObject for Intent Based Navigation in...
entry.content:
Dear Michael,

is there any specific UI5 version required to achieve this working with dynamic path expressions instead of fixed values? We tried with path expressions in UI 1.120 but end up in troubles in the StableIdHelper._getStableIdPartFromIBN functions.

Kind regards, Fabian

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA api data export
entry.content:
Hi,
We need to extract some finance data from SAP S/4HANA, including fields such as:

  • Company Code
  • G/L Account
  • Assignment Reference
  • Journal Entry
  • Journal Entry Type
  • Posting Date
  • Posting Key
  • Amount in Company Code Currency
  • Tax Code
  • Clearing Journal Entry
  • Profit Center
  • Segment
  • Journal Entry Item Text
  • Number of Items
  • Offsetting Account
  • Supplier

Our goal is to ingest this data into our data lake for reporting purposes.
I see multiple API options available here. Could you advise on which one would be best suited for our requirements?

entry.title: Re: I want to use Row_number() in cds views
entry.content:
I run into the same problem today, but I hacked myself out in a different way since the expected result table is small. I just joined by source table with itself, but the inner join only counts the number of rows where the key is less or equal the current row.

Not highly efficient on the database, but I am not a programmer and did not bother to learn how to implement a ABAP Class for it.

define view entity  as select from Table1 as _foo

join Table1 as _bar on _bar.key1 <= _foo.key1

{ key _foo.key1, 

  count (*) as counter

}

group by _foo.key1

entry.title: Re: digital skills initiative
entry.content:
Hi @hamza809 ,

Thanks for writing! I'll send an invite your way.

Discovering the Basics of SAP S/4HANA Project System

entry.title: Noc Codes Canada
entry.content:
Hi all, 

In Canada it is a legal requirement for NOC codes to be kept up to date for reporting requirements.   

I understand that the picklist needs to be updated as the numbers have gone from a 4 to a 5 digit number.  My question is, does SAP keep these lists up to date for us so that we can download them and update our positions, or is this something I have to manually upload into the picklist and then do a mass upload to update the Noc codes for all our positions? 

I did find this post from 2011 and was wondering if this is still relevant:  Please review the entries in T5K13 via transaction SM30 to ensure NOC codes and double click on the Job you will find the screen for maintaining NOC codes.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Discrete Vs repetitive Vs Process Industry in SAP PP
entry.content:
Thanks for share Subhrant!

Regards,

Adilson

The search help works fine in Fiori, but it's not showing in the SAP GUI transaction VK11. The field itself is visible in VK11, but no search help is available. Additionaly in KONP structure no search help available. How can I add search help for VK11 to for this field. 

 

Fiori App:

GUI:

entry.title: Re: Need help with printing of an https:// URL in backgro...
entry.content:
Hi Mig,

yes, "complicated" HTML pages with lots of style sheets and JavaScript could be a challenge or at least a lot of difficult hard work -- not only for the Business Connector, but also for those HTML-to-PDF converters! (I'm not an expert in this topic, so now idea, how much functionality these converters provide.)

However, if the printout does not need to look "exactly" like it is displayed in a browser, you could perhaps just use the data from the plain "naked" .html base page and "ignore" the referenced stylesheets, etc.?!

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 3 Contest Activities
entry.content:
@thomas_jung 

#BFAB9F is missing. Coule you please check;-)

entry.title: Re: From tech sales to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hi Triphose,

Welcome to the SAP Learning Community!

It’s inspiring to see your enthusiasm for transitioning into SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud consulting, especially given your strong background in business development and CRM management.

Your experience with Salesforce and HubSpot will undoubtedly be a valuable asset in understanding client needs and delivering tailored SAP S/4HANA solutions.

From my perspective, adopting the SAP Activate Methodology can truly transform S/4HANA Public Cloud implementations. Embracing a Cloud Mindset and a Fit-to-Standard approach are essential for success. S/4HANA Public Cloud comes pre-loaded with best practices, ensuring that customers gain an easy access to industry-leading business processes developed in partnership with SAP. By adhering to these standard practices, clients also receive regular updates and new functionalities, resulting in a faster return on investment compared to other solutions!

Finally, congratulations on completing your training for the SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant! This is a significant milestone, and I’m excited to see how you apply your skills in supply chain management and finance.

Wishing you the best of luck on your journey!

Cristiano Pinto

entry.title: Re: Can we update batch characters to the batch while GR...
entry.content:
Hello @RaghavanKathamuthu 

You can update batch characteristics during goods movement either with MBCFC004 user-exit or preferably BAdI LOBM_PROC_GM_CHARC_VAL_MODIF. If both are implemented, the BAdI is executed first. 

The fields you have highlighted in your screenshot are used with Reference Characteristics Reference characteristics derive their value directly from underlying master data (batch master), e.g. expiration date. They are used mostly in batch determination strategies.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Is there an API to clear notated items and record advance payments in S4HANA Public cloud?
entry.content: Adding tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Finance

Regards

Lisa

entry.title: S4HC - Service entry sheet response to Ariba failed in S4 - HTTP Code: 406 ( Not Acceptable)
entry.content:
When we create a Purchase Order (PO) in S4HC and the supplier sends the confirmation and the Service Entry Sheet from Ariba to S4HC. the SES is auto-approved and should send a response back to Ariba. However, this response is failing in S4HC with HTTP Code: 406 (Not Acceptable). Without this response, we're unable to invoice the service.

Can I please get help with this.

entry.title: Driving Innovation with SAP Build at SAP TechEd 2024
entry.content:
SAP TechEd 2024 delivered a series of transformative announcements, setting the stage for how developers and businesses will innovate using SAP technology. With a strong focus on generative AI and advancements in SAP Build, this year's event underscored SAP's commitment to driving next-generation business transformation.

Here is a comprehensive look at the major highlights for SAP Build from this year's SAP TechEd.

 

SAP Build: Streamlining Development Across the Board

One of the most significant advancements from SAP TechEd 2024 is the expansion of SAP Build. SAP Build enables developers to extend and create applications on SAP S/4HANA Cloud and other line-of-business applications seamlessly. SAP's new extensibility wizard allows developers to create extensions from S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with SAP Build, while maintaining critical business context like objects, events, and data. This feature ensures that extensions, whether developed side-by-side or on-stack, preserve essential business logic without data loss.

Developers will also be able to leverage the extensibility wizard to create SAP Fiori and SAPUI5 applications directly within SAP Build, reducing time-to-market for new apps and simplifying workflows.

Last but certainly not least, SAP announced the integration of ABAP development environments within SAP Build. By the end of 2024, developers will be able to access ABAP tools from the SAP Build Lobby, the platform's central hub for all development projects. This update makes SAP Build a unified development environment, allowing fusion teams to collaborate seamlessly across multiple technology stacks. Teams can now move effortlessly between SAP Build Apps, SAP Build Code, and ABAP environments, driving faster innovation.

For a more comprehensive view of what this looks like for developers, click here.

 

Generative AI: Joule and Beyond

Generative AI was a central theme through SAP TechEd 2024 with new capabilities designed to make developers' lives easier and applications smarter. Joule, SAP's generative AI assistant, is set to expand its capabilities across the SAP Build portfolio, providing AI-powered task automation, intelligent support within development environments, and more.

In 2025, ABAP developers will gain the ability to use Joule to generate high-quality code and unit tests that adhere to ABAP Cloud development standards. Joule will also assist with legacy code explanations, helping developers modernize outdated systems and accelerate the transition to clean core.

Developers can also look forward to Joule Studio, a new platform for building custom AI skills for Joule. These skills can be integrated into S/4HANA Cloud, allowing businesses to create bespoke AI-powered workflows tailored to their specific needs. Joule's generative AI capabilities will soon extend beyond SAP environments, allowing developers to integrate non-SAP applications with ease.

SAP also introduced new features in the Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core, with models like IBM Granite, DALL·E 3, and Amazon Titan, coming to the platform by the end of 2024. These tools will empower developers to create AI-driven applications, including image generation and sophisticated AI orchestration workflows. Generative AI Hub will also offer prompt templates, data masking, and orchestration capabilities to streamline AI implementation across various use cases. 

 

What SAP TechEd 2024 Means for Developers

SAP TechEd 2024 showcased a clear vision for the future, with innovations in SAP Build and generative AI that will reshape how developers and businesses approach enterprise applications. With the continuous expansion of AI-driven features like Joule and the unified development environments, SAP is positioning itself at the forefront of digital transformation.

As we move into 2025, developers can expect even more opportunities to leverage coding capabilities of all skillsets and AI to create smarter, more efficient business solutions. Whether you're a seasoned developer or just beginning your journey with SAP, the new tools and enhancements announced at TechEd will empower you to build the future of enterprise technology.

Start exploring these powerful new capabilities today by signing up for an SAP BTP Trial account and take your first step toward building the future of enterprise applications.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano ,

I am an HR Professional with over 10 years of experience in HR, and over 20 years of experience in the military, serving various roles in engineering and logistics. I found myself needing to embark on this SAP journey after having been part of a job loss. While looking for employment, I had found that the skillsets needed outside of the organization I was part of, relied heavily on SAP products and Tableau. I started a learning initiative for Tableau, self development and now SAP, specifically within HR products so that I can become a more sought out candidate within the Human Resources field. 

Many of the jobs I had applied for and interviewed for, ultimately did not pan out once it was realized that I did not have SAP experience or Tableau experience. Due to that, I am committed in ensuring I complete SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core, as well as look for options in completing analytics cloud in the future.

Thank you,

Josue F (Sway)

entry.title: Send processing log post processing of the XML/SOAP API
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using asynchronous API "SALESORDERBULKREQUEST_IN" which is based on SOAP/XML technology for creation of Sales order. Since this is asynchronous log generated post processing will not be sent back.

I would like to understand if there is anyway to send the log post processing the XML.

We cant use the synchronous API as the volume is high and SAP suggests to use asynchronous call if the volume is high.

Thanks,

Bharath

entry.title: Upload file in Application server (AL11) in SAP Profitability & Performance Management/BW/4HANA
entry.content:
Are you struggling to understand how can we upload, Delete and Download the files from application server without SAP delivered transactions CG3Z and CG3Y in SAP Performance Management system. Incase if the file size is larger than accepted it is not possible to upload in regular method of uploading directly in PaPM system.

  • "CG3Z" is typically used for uploading files into the SAP system
  • "CG3Y" is used for exporting files from the SAP system

Instead we have SAP delivered functional modules available to perform this activity. Let us walk through the step by step process to perform Upload files from AL11 in SAP BW/4HANA and Profitability and Performance Management.

Process to upload the files in AL11: 

Step 1: Save the required file in .CSV format in your desktop 

Step 2: Login to SAP and go to the Transaction code SE37 and enter the functional module ARCHIVFILE_CLIENT_TO_SERVER as below

Then hit Execute button as show above.

Step 3:  We need to provide the Path (Source path: for example your desktop file path) and Target path (Application server (AL11) path). In case if the file is case sensitive then selection the option other wise you can execute to upload the file.

Execute the functional module with all the selections and the file will be processed as below,

I hope you like this post!!

Thanks,

Shyam.

entry.title: mm42 attributes from which table to extract
entry.content: Please let me know if it is necessary to write a technical assignment for a programmer. I created the function using CT04 and users will manually select in MM 42. We need a table from which we can extract data about specific products, since there will be different values for different products.

entry.title: Re: SAP Basis Learning: Work processes
entry.content: @LaxmiM - @L_Skorwider might be a great person to follow given your background on BASIS!

entry.title: How can we link PR with Sourcing Project and Contract WS?
Re: Adding SubItems in OutboundDeliveryRequest Using PDI ABSL or API
entry.content: Hello, did you find an answer?

entry.title: Re: Introducing SAP Concur’ s Identity and User Provisioning Webservices
entry.content:
Hi Henny - If you are planning to use SAP ICS to maintain your employee information then your S/4 Hana site needs to have an SAP HR mini-master setup on it at a minimum.   The version of the API that is used by ICS is dependent upon the version of S4 Hana that you implement.  Only S/4Hana 2023 and above use the new V4 API's that this article series talks about.   

Regarding delegates, there is a new mapping option that is available for spend delegates but the way that it is implemented depends on your design.  It may require the use of a custom table.   

You may find OSS note 3363157 useful.

entry.title: SAP PI/PO SFTP to SFTP pass trough scenario UNIX to WINDOWS (LF to CRLF)
entry.content:
Hello Community.

We have a pass trough scenario (there is no conversion) from SFTP UNIX to SFTP WINDOWS.
The expected line sapartor in the target file is CRLF:

 

In File adapter there is a parameter (File Type) where we can set the 'Text' value and it's automatically handled by the adapter to use CRLF.
In SFTP adpter there is no this parameter available.

We have being trying to use different EJB modules (SAP XI Sample/ConvertCRLFfromToLF, MessageTransformBean and TextCodepageConversionBean) with no sucess.

Could you please provide any experience you had with this situation and how it was solved.

I appreciate any comments/help.

 

Thank you!
Fellipe

entry.title: Re: Need help with printing of an https:// URL in backgro...
entry.content: Hi Ulrich, Really appreciate the quick note! we shall keep that in mind during analysis. Regards!

entry.title: Re: 2024-2H-LMS Release LRN-154487 Browse Library Feature for Enhanced Search - Question about RBP
entry.content: Thank You very Much - It was because of a known bug that SAP Engineering team is looking into as of 10/15/2024 - KBA 3528845 (https://me.sap.com/notes/3528845).

entry.title: CATS from Fieldglass to other Tools
entry.content:
Is it possible to create time sheets using CATS in Fieldglass and then have these exported to other CATs tools (such as employee central or the CO module?)

 

Scenario:
- External Worker creates CATs Time Sheet in Fieldglass as first as start of time-sheet process
- CATs Timesheet is exported to other SAP applications for processing

 

Or would this require development outside the standard?

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP: The Foundation for Intelligent Enterprise with SAP Business AI
entry.content:
Thanks for your feedback! Since you mentioned being intrigued by generative AI in HR, I thought you might be interested in this upcoming SAP event: "HR and the role of AI": https://event.on24.com/wcc/r/4675887/CB13DC6F087A36F97BAE4DB2395A02B5?partnerref=sap.com-ai
It seems like a great opportunity to learn more about SAP's AI strategy and see a live demo of Joule. I'm also planning to explore those areas in more detail in future blog posts.

entry.title: Re: Dates and Roundings in Compensation

Please find the screenshots below:

This amount when gets published in EC is same..265887.18. But when period base salary is calculated then it is 22157.26 whereas if we see in the comp worksheet, monthly salary is 22157.27

The setup information is given by @MicheleCordano in the above post.

Kindly guide.

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

Arpita

entry.title: Re: SAP PI/PO SFTP to SFTP pass trough scenario UNIX to WINDOWS (LF to CRLF)
entry.content: What did you enter for the value of parameter 'convert' for the SAP XI Sample/ConvertCRLFfromToLF bean?

entry.title: How Can I Search Documents With Search Term Efficiently?
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a c# application which using sap bo rest apis. I am displaying documents in the page. User should search document with search term. However, this search term should not only look at the name of the document. If the search term is mentioned in the document, it should be listed in the search results even if it is not mentioned in the name. I am using below code;

        private IEnumerable<Entry> SearchTabs(string searchTerm)
        {
            return GetTabsByCategory(_category)
                .SelectMany(t => GetTabContentsById(t.Content.Data.Id.ToString()))
                .Where(entry =>
                {
                    string detail = GetDocumentDetail(entry.Content.Data.Id.ToString());
                    bool isInDetail = detail.IndexOf(searchTerm, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) >= 0;

                    return isInDetail;
                });
        }

 In above code GetTabsByCategory(_category) method gets folders based on _category. Then gets all documents belongs to folders using GetTabContentsById method. After that, I am researching search term in GetDocumentDetail method with passing documentId. GetDocumentDetail methods goes to _baseUrl/raylight/v1/documents/{documentId} api and returns document detail as string. But this process takes too long and does not complete.

How can I do this more efficiently?

entry.title: Re: Conversion routine PRIDB - abap dump
entry.content: Hello, I am having this iisue but I have not found the root that you mention, for S4HANA system is another one?

We configured:

Parameter Name: convert
Parameter Value: LFtoCRLF

entry.title: Re: Rehire with SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding: From Exit to Re-entry
entry.content:

Thank you for the great explanation!

Is it possible to use this functionality with the Mini EC? 😶

entry.title: Re: What is the replacement of IDoc in S/4HANA public cloud?
entry.content: A few Idocs are still available, mainly master data related ones. Transactional ones like ORDERS, INVOIC etc are not available anymore. You can see this if you create the Communication Arrangement for the related scenario. Mostly, IDocs are replaced by the respective SOAP services. Unfortunately, often they don't cover everything that IDocs do...

entry.title: Re: Customer has issues accessing SAP SQL Anywhere 17 EBF...
entry.content:
Chris,

As Carlos has mentioned, we have just recently Purchase SQL Anywhere from SAP. Not as part of any other product but the SQL Anywhere from the SAP Store. 

However no access is being provided to get the bug fixes/patches for the product just the link provided me.sap.com:me.sap.com/notes/2381119 howerver there is no access to a P user is provided only S users, as best we can determine, but no one in SAP appears to be able to answer.

So I'm not sure the relavance of your comment, as it was stated that the SQL Anywhee was purchases

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere & SDI CDC: How to get SDI Change Data Capture to ignore archived records
entry.content: https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3413330

entry.title: Not able to access SAP Activate Roadmap Viewer or SAP Best practices for S/4 HANA on prem
entry.content:
I am trying to access some links like Roadmap viewer e.g. https://go.support.sap.com/roadmapviewer/#/group//roadmapOverviewPage/MATS4HANA

Anything on go.support.sap.com is not opening for me. Are there any updated link for roadmap viewer?

Also, I am not able find SAP Best practices for S/4 HANA on prem on SAP Signavio Process Navigator

I can only see the same for S/4 HANA cloud. Although I can see SAP notes for S/4 HANA on prem but it would be great to check it via Navigator. Please help if you have any pointers.

Thanks,

Gaurav

entry.title: Re: Customer has issues accessing SAP SQL Anywhere 17 EBF...
entry.content: McMartin,You are signed in with a P-user ID. Visitors with an S-user ID will benefit from more tools and enhanced functionality. If you are an SAP customer, contact a user administrator in your company to request such an ID. Your SAP Local Support Center can help you identify your administrators. If you already own an S-user ID, log out now and log in with your S-user ID.

entry.title: Re: Customer has issues accessing SAP SQL Anywhere 17 EBF...
entry.content: This link lilke the above look can't be accessed unless you are a S user.

entry.title: Re: Customer has issues accessing SAP SQL Anywhere 17 EBF...
entry.content: SAP Statement is “In the past, you would have paid for maintenance support with your SQL Anywhere purchase and you would have received a welcome letter with a unique S-User ID that would allow you to log into support.sap.com to raise incident support requests. This process has changed and maintenance support is no longer included with this product since it is now procured from our third party re-seller Digital River. Therefore, you won't get an S-User ID or support for this solution via support.sap.com anymore.” But not offering any solution to providing access to the EBF's so you are expected to buy an unsupported prroduct in buy SQL Anywhere

entry.title: Re: Error of AR29N for Real Revaluation Area separate from Orginal Depreciation Area
entry.content: For your issue, please be aware that in test mode the revaluation areas are not created, therefore the new valuation posting logic cannot be simulated and the error FAA_POST014 is triggered. Please consider create the revaluation areas by select option "No posting" indicator under the "standard revaluation" tab and run in background. Then check AR29N behavior again.

I have completed the course Develop Applications Running on SAP BTP Using SAP HANA Cloud for certification SAP Certified Development Associate - SAP HANA Cloud 1.0

Thank you,

Son Nguyen

entry.title: SAP EWM Error /SCWM/WM_SEL041 Storage process step IKIB is not assigned to storage process IB02
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
I am trying to set up a Goods Receipt Process with unloading, deconsolidation and putaway.

I am using the Storage Process  IKIB

To which I assign the corresponding steps: 

The download and deconsolidation steps work correctly, but when I try to complete the deconsolidation process in transaction /SCWM/DCONS the following error occurs:

 

and it doesn't allow me to activate storage tasks.

I would appreciate it if you could guide me to find the error as I have not been able to find the solution.

Thank you very much.

  •            Detailed description of the issue
  •            Screenshots: To help us visualize the issue
  •            Please also provide the Course Code of course.

Kind regards,
Margit

entry.content: Billing block in VD05 is not copied to sales order.

entry.title: Re: inbound trasportation costs depending of quantity received from the raw material supplier
entry.content: According to the agreement you stated the rate is 1 euro per KG thus the invoice would be for 68 euro. I know in the US our contract allows for a fuel surcharge on the invoice, not certain if that is in your agreement because you did not state that it was.

entry.title: Re: way to download an Idoc to XML
entry.content: You saved me! Thank you. Strange that this report is not more well known - and that it's such a hidden way to reach something so simple.

entry.title: Re: Using SAP Signavio Process governance with Service no...
entry.content: Thank you Manuel.

entry.title: Re: SAP business Objects following upgrade, unable to login
entry.content:
We were finally successful. 

At first we just kept disabling services and restarting SIA until we were able to consistently login.  Doing so we isolated it down to the server running "Core" services.

  • Insight to Action
  • Monitoring
  • Publishing Post Processing,
  • Publishing Service
  • Security Token Service
  • Trace Log Service
  • Translation Service

We then left this disabled create a new server and added the individual components until we found that the "Monitoring Service" was the one causing problems.  

From there we learned that under CMC-->applications-->Alerting Application, Unchecking email notifications allowed us to keep the monitoring service running; but with out email notifications. 

This made us ask why: so we dug into alerts/watches using email notifications from  BI Admin Studio.   under the: watches; there were several system generated watches which we could not get to step "Review" when editing.  This lead us to an assumption corrupt watches existed and email were somehow preventing/causing CMS to become unresponsive. 

Once we disabled the email alerts; the login issue went away completely.  Following the upgrade we deleted and re-created the services which had corrupt Watches.  (those watches which wouldn't let us get through all 4 steps + review when editing.  Now all watches can get through the "Review" step when editing.  We'll see if that helps next time; but we also presently have left off off the email alerts from Applications-->Alerting Applications within CMC. 

As to why Watches alerts would prevent login... We have no idea.  Somehow the corrupt alerts where causing the server to spin, deadlock and subsequent calls to the CMS database were hung up.  If we cleared a lock; then login would work; but there was no deadlock; just a DB waiting on the CMS server to "Finish" a transaction which it never did....

entry.title: Re: crystal viewer parameter loses value on navigation
entry.content: RAPPBasePage is your application, loading the report using a session and the postback keeps the report in session so it doesn't lose the parameters. No Idea what the report key is you mentioned

entry.title: Re: webi time dimension returns blank in data; 1970 for 1...
entry.content:
Yes. And I looked through patch notes and didn't see anything up through patch 7 that indicated there was a bug fixed with time dimensions.

  • The release notes have 19 entries containing "Time" in the subject, none of which relate tot "Time Dimensions"
  • There are 22 entries related to "Dimension" but none of those have to do with "Time Dimensions"

 

The issue appears somehow related to Merge Dimension/and or combine cube; both of which are being used in this report.

entry.title: Group condition discount
entry.content:
Hello SAP Gurus please i have a scenario where i have lets say three line items of 3 different materials with the same material pricing group.

For two of them i have set up a discount  scale in vk11 I set up a discount condition type (calculation type - quantity and quantity scale based), i set it as header condition, item condition, group condition and tried to assign the group condition routine 1, 2 and 3 as well. Now i want the system to set the discount amount (according to scales) according to the cumulative amount of all three items (not just the two that have the condition type present in the line items). The cumulation works for the two that have the discount condition type but the third is left out can you please help?

entry.title: Re: How to remove/disable Goal Alignment Spotlight action...
entry.content:
Hi,

To disable the goal alignment spotlight, just set the goal-tree-link to false in the attributes of the goal plan template in the XML from provisioning.

I hope this solves this issue. 🙂

entry.title: Re: crystal viewer parameter loses value on navigation
entry.content: Don, regarding "No Idea what the report key is you mentioned", this is what I am referring to: the code in the article you referred me to, has this line (in the butReport_Click method): Session.Add(“Report”, crReportDocument); therefore, the code is saving the report document in the session under the "Report" key. My question was, is this key name specifically required? are you telling me that the cr viewer will look in the session with this key?

entry.title: aATP ABC set-up not confirming orders
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We have planned to consider #aATP Alternative Based Confirmation functionality for our project. Have configured substitution strategy (Full confirmation), alternative determination and alternative control. When a sales order is created (for the combination defined in the access), confirmation is showing zero. It is not showing 'original plant' filed itself in the sales order. It says delivery is not possible.

when I removed the combination from the access - Configure alternative control app (basically disable ABC), it works normal showing availability.

Am I missing something, could someone help to resolve this issue.

Thanks, 

Shilpa S

entry.title: Re: Executive Review Based on Route Map Step - Release 20...
entry.content:
Hi @Gunnar92 

It's the permission roles that grant the template access to Executive Review that show in this column, not the permission groups. Not sure if it was a typo on your side and you meant roles instead of groups ?

I'm preparing an end to end demo with lots of insights for the next few hours, will share the link here, stay tuned.

Xavier

entry.title: Re: when any material document is created, also get poste...
entry.content:
Hi Sella 

I dont think it is possilble because when we generate material document number it is posted  and updated PO and FI document. 

What is the purpose of it . It will be good if you can explain.

There is a way  which is called two step GR  using movement 103 and 105 . When you will do 103 movement GR blocked stock it will be posted  But there are no accounting entries, only material document will be generated. you can release from GR blocked stock with movement type 105 which is same effect of 101. 

You see below thread it may help you

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/significance-of-movement-types-103-105-107-and-109/ba-p/13562531#:~:text=In%20the%20case%20of%20103,a%20105%20movement%20is%20done.

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: Download ALV Report to excel file with expand/collapse functionality
entry.content: ALV doesn't have expand/collapse. For the rows, are you talking about the ALV tree technology? But then I don't get how it goes for columns?

entry.title: Re: SAP PI/PO SFTP to SFTP pass trough scenario UNIX to WINDOWS (LF to CRLF)
entry.content: Can you call a program from the operating system? There is one LINUX program that does exactly you need: dos2unix.

entry.title: Re: SAP PI/PO SFTP to SFTP pass trough scenario UNIX to WINDOWS (LF to CRLF)
entry.content: That value should be working, I had used it on more than one occasion when I last worked with a PI/PO system.

entry.title: Combine Cube Left join does not return all matching records from Right side in a 1:M relationship.
entry.content:
ENVIORNMENT: 

SAP BusinessObjects BI Platform 4.3 Support Pack 4 Patch 2
Version: 14.3.4.4852 (WEBI)

SETUP:

Create a report which contains two data sources which relate in a 1:M fashion.

Use Combine Cube and left join to relate the data such that the data set with 1 is the primary and the data set with the M is the secondary.

Note in the results in combine cube: the record count matches the data from the left side; when one would expect the records to match that of the many side where matches were found.  In our example 1:687 so results should have 687.

Furthermore when the created cube has all records dropped onto a new report within the WEBI Document; only 1 records is displayed (we limited our data such that there is only 1 record in the primary data set; but the many dataset has 687 of records matching the joined value. yet only 1 is disabled. 

When we switch the join to be a full outer join; all records are returned from both sides as expected.

When we then filter the report to exclude records which have a "NULL" result from the primary data set side, we get the expected results. (Making the Full outer join behave like the left join should)

Basically: it looks like LEFT join is broke in a 1:M relationship... 

QUESTIONS:

  1. Are others having this issue?  
  2. Is this by design?  Should we always have the "Many" side as the Primary and the right side as the 1?
  3. If this was a M:M shouldn't it display all records from the Primary many and those that match from the secondary Many? (it's not)
  4. What can be done to mitigate it (yeah we'll upgrade to 7+ at some point but patch notes don't indicate a fix for this yet)

entry.title: Re: Issue in Display of Cost in S_ALR_8103558 report agai...
entry.content:
Nehas;

Have you already checked the 'Actual' column on the form 12KST1A (T-code CJE6)?

It should look like this.

Regards

entry.title: Re: xsls file from AL11 convert to internal table in SAP ABAP
entry.content: (deleted)

entry.title: GROW with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, base: An Overview of the base edition bundle
entry.content:
GROW with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, base: An Overview of the base edition

Since March 2023, customers who have selected SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition as the core ERP system to run their businesses have received additional entitlements beyond the core functionality. These added capabilities form one of two comprehensive bundles: GROW with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, base and GROW with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, premium.
 
In this blog, I will focus on the base edition bundle, providing a clear explanation of each entitlement and its business value. I will discuss the premium edition in a separate blog, which I will hyperlink here once created.

This blog is designed for business users and consultants with ERP experience, aiming to provide practical insights into each entitlement's purpose and when it’s most valuable. Please note, statements about adoption difficulty and required personas are based on my research and experience, and other cases may vary based on the specific business context etc.
Note 1: Hyperlinks to SAP4ME will take you directly to the relevant page if you're logged into a productive SAP4ME system and have suitable rights
Note 2: This blog speaks to the entitlements included as of 2024-10-17

Blog Outline:

  1. GROW with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Base: Overview
  2. Core Entitlement: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
  3. General Notes on Additional Entitlements
  4. Base Entitlement: Finance - Group Reporting
  5. Base Entitlement: BTP - SAP Build Process Automation
  6. Base Entitlement: BTP - SAP Build Workzone, Standard Edition
  7. Base Entitlement: BTP - CPEA Credits
  8. Base Entitlement: SAP Digital Access
  9. Base Entitlement: Ariba Buying, Base Edition
  10. Closing Remarks

 

  1. GROW with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Base: Overview
    The Base Edition comes in two SKUs: 8014771 for global markets and 8014782 for the Greater China region (which excludes some entitlements). This blog focuses on SKU 8014771.

    How to identify if you have this SKU:
    1. Log in to SAP for Me: Reporting > Purchased Solutions
    2. Under 'Orders by Solution Area,' select S/4HANA Public - your SKU will be listed on the right. If 8014771 appears with a valid date, you have the GROW Base Edition. If 8014761 appears, you have Premium. Other SKUs likely represent SKUs that do not include this full suite of entitlements.

  2. Core Entitlement: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
    The core entitlement includes:
    1. Services & Support: Access to support services like incident creation, onboarding advisor support, and the SAP Enterprise Support Portfolio, which offers learning content and services such as Continuous Quality Checks.
    2. Systems: Access to multiple systems (e.g., ERP production, test, and development systems) and related tenants. This also includes non-ERP systems like Cloud ALM, CBC, SAP for Me, and BTP systems.
    3. Functionality: Access to pre-configured scope items. Commonly used ones include J59 - Accounts Receivable and J60 - Accounts Payable. You can view and manage scope items through SAP Activate’s Availability and Dependencies of Scope Items accelerator.
    4. Full User Equivalent (FUE): Your contract includes a specific number of FUEs that govern how many business users can access core functionality. Check your licensed FUE quantity in SAP for Me: Reporting - License Consumption under metric CY334.
    5. Entitlement Measurement: Overuse is possible but monitored by SAP. Your account team will reach out in case of overconsumption.

  3. General Notes on Additional Entitlements
    What is an "entitlement"?
    An entitlement refers to the right to use a specific set of functionalities that may normally require extra payment or licenses. In the GROW Base Edition, certain features are included up to a threshold without extra software licensing costs. For example, Group Reporting is included up to 25 objects in the base edition.

    Are the "entitlements" completely free?
    The outlined entitlements mean there's no software licensing cost if you use up to the amount indicated. Usage beyond that quantity will require additional (paid) licenses, and you may need to consider some investment of business time and effort to adopt new features and functions, and in some cases you'll require consultants for the setup and implementation.

    What does "adoption" mean in this blog?
    I'm using 'adoption' to refer to the setup AND usage a software functionality. The setup or implementation is the process of adopting, and once it's setup and being actively used  - then I would then say the customer has adopted a feature/entitlement.
    Base Edition - Additional Entitlements:
    GROW with SAP Public Edition, base - additional entitlements
  4. Base Edition Entitlement: Group Reporting
    Business Case
    Group Reporting helps businesses that operate multiple subsidiaries or legal entities shorten the time needed for financial consolidation. It automates key activities and streamlines the data model, making it highly valuable for businesses with complex financial structures. For single-entity businesses, this functionality is not immediately relevant.

    Business Role Relevance
    Senior finance roles, such as Finance Managers and Group Controllers, will benefit from this functionality for managing financial consolidations.

    Entitlement
    The GROW Base Edition includes 25 Group Reporting objects. An object typically refers to a legal entity within a consolidation group (e.g., parent and subsidiary companies). Additional licenses are required for more than 25 objects. Official documentation is here

    License Consumption
    You can track your consumption using metric CH112 in SAP for Me under SAP4ME: Reporting -> License Consumption.

    Overusage
    It is possible to over-consume your allocated Group Reporting objects. SAP will periodically review your usage under metric CH112. You can license additional units by contacting SAP for SKU 8013710.

    Scope Item Relevance
    The main scope item for Group Reporting is 1SG. This measures whether data from group reporting has been posted into the system. You can validate its usage in Portfolio & Products - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Usage. Other Scope Items flagged as Group Reporting relevant are  287, 28B, 4R7, 2U6

    More Information
    For more detailed guidance on adopting Group Reporting, refer to this blog post. This deeper descriptions, webinar links, and crucially it outlines the key steps to adopting group reporting

    Key Adoption Notes:
    Expertise needed: You'll need a combination of BTP administrators and finance consultants for configuration and initial setup.
    Adoption Effort:  Rated 3 (on a scale from 1 to 5). You’ll need finance consultants, and technical consultants with expertise in BTP to set up this functionality.
    Not to be confused with: This entitlement does not include Group Reporting Data Collection, which must be licensed separately.

  5. Base Edition Entitlement: SAP Build Process Automation
    Business Case
    SAP Build Process Automation enables non-developers, such as key users or business process experts, to create bots or automated workflows based on a set of rules. This is valuable when no standard ERP functionality exists to meet a specific business need, for example, automating the creation of general ledger accounts.

    Business Role Relevance
    Consultants, process automation specialists, and business key users involved in implementing and running the ERP system will find this useful.

    Entitlement
    The base edition includes:
    20 Standard Users (CP278) – Can trigger or interact with a process.
    2 Advanced Users (CP279) – Can design, monitor, and administrate processes.
    1 Unattended Automation (CP283) – A bot that continuously monitors and executes a process.
    Documentation of these entitlements are here

    License Consumption
    You can track your consumption of CP278, CP279, and CP283 in SAP4ME - Reporting - License

    Overusage
    You are blocked from overconsuming these licenses. Once the entitlement limit is reached, additional licenses must be purchased or allocated through CPEA credits.

    Scope Item Relevance
    There is no specific scope item for SAP Build Process Automation.

    More Information
    This community page has overview videos and links to all other resources. This area of the API hub is where you find SAP pre-created templates.

    Key Adoption Notes
    Expertise Needed: You’ll need a BTP expert for the base setup. Then you'll need LoB experts e.g. finance experts to develop meaningful automations as per your needs. Setup steps are outlined here.
    Adoption Effort: 2/5 for platform setup by BTP experts; 2-4/5 for workflow creation depending on complexity.

  6. Base Edition Entitlement: SAP Build Workzone, Standard Edition

    Business Case
    SAP Build Workzone allows organizations to create a central homepage for employees with user-specific access to applications across various SAP systems. This enhances efficiency by providing direct links to necessary business apps for roles like sales managers or purchasing clerks. The more SAP systems used throughout your organization, the more value this solution will offer your organization.

    Business Role Relevance
    This functionality benefits employees across departments who frequently use SAP applications in their daily tasks.

    Entitlement
    You receive 1 Workzone user per FUE licensed. For example, if you have licensed 100 FUEs for the core, 100 users can access SAP Build Workzone.

    License Consumption
    You can track your consumption of CP264 in SAP4ME - Reporting - License Consumption

    Overusage
    Additional licenses or CPEA credits are required if the number of users exceeds your entitlement.

    Scope Item Relevance
    There is no scope item related to SAP Build Workzone usage.

    More Information
    More documentation is on the SAP Build Workzone Discovery Center.

    Key Adoption Notes
    Expertise Needed: A BTP global administrator for initial setup, followed by non-technical key users for managing pages.
    Adoption Effort: 2/5 for BTP experts; 3/5 for non-experts. View the setup steps in this tutorial.
    Not to be confused with: SAP Build Workzone is distinct from SAP Start, which a more lightweight solution without ability to consider other SAP system authorizations. SAP Build Workzone Advanced Edition is a different product without a migration path from the standard edition.

  7. Base Edition Entitlement: CPEA Credits

    Business Case
    CPEA Credits (Cloud Platform Enterprise Agreement) allow businesses to consume various BTP services within predefined limits without additional fees. These credits can be applied to services like Integration Suite, SAP Build Apps, and Cloud Identity Services. You can view the list of included services here in the Discovery Center. There's more nuance to the CPEA credit commercial model, which you can read about here.

    Business Role Relevance
    Technical teams managing BTP services will oversee consumption of this entitlement. The business areas that consume this depend on which services you're utilizing from BTP - many are in the technical / administration area.

    Entitlement
    Customers receive 1% of their net Annual Contract Value in CPEA credits, with a minimum value of €2,000 and a maximum value of €16,000.

    License Consumption
    You can view your CPEA credit balance in SAP4ME - Finance and Legal - Enterprise Agreements

    Scope Item Relevance
    CPEA credit usage is not tied to any scope item, as it applies across various BTP services.

    More Information
    Each service that can be paid for by CPEA credits are listed here in the Discovery Center - and this same resource provides additional information on each service.

    Key Adoption Notes
    Expertise Needed: BTP experts and business area owners are required to manage and utilize CPEA credits effectively.
    Adoption Effort: Varies depending on the BTP service being used.
    Not to be confused with: CPEA credits differ from BTPEA and EA credits, which operate similarly but cover different services.

  8. Base Edition Entitlement: SAP Digital Access

    Business Case
    SAP Digital Access governs how non-human interactions (such as external systems creating documents) are licensed. It is relevant when integrating third-party systems like Salesforce to trigger document creation within SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

    Business Role Relevance
    IT and integration specialists responsible for system integrations with non-SAP platforms will need to manage this entitlement.

    Entitlement
    The base edition includes 100,000 digital access documents per year.

    License Consumption
    Track your consumption by launching the License Compliance Digital Access app in the productive SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system. This guidance document shows how to do this and provides other useful context on measuring your digital access usage for SAP S/4HANA

    Overusage
    It is possible to exceed your annual document allowance. SAP periodically reviews your consumption and the account team will reach out in the case of overconsumption.

    Scope Item Relevance
    This entitlement applies to external system interactions and is not tied to specific scope items.

    More Information
    Refer to the Digital Access documentation for a more detailed explanation.

    Key Adoption Notes
    Expertise Needed: No specific competency is needed. Entitlement consumption should be reviewed by the party responsible for your SAP system billing & commercials.
    Adoption Effort: 1. There's nothing to setup per se for Digital Access - you only be aware of it and monitor your consumption.
    Other Notes: SAP Digital Access is only necessary for non-SAP systems. If SAP systems trigger document creation, digital access is not consumed.

  9. Base Edition Entitlement: Ariba Buying, Base Edition

    Business Case
    Ariba Buying Base Edition allows employees to make internal purchase requisitions. It's scope is similar to the core ERP requisitioning scope of 18J, but Ariba Buying Base has an enhanced UX and has the capability to integrate with many advanced features, such as directly connecting to supplier catalogs and the Ariba Business network.

    Business Role Relevance
    All company employees can benefit from an improved user experience for purchase requisitions, particularly in organizations using self-service requisitioning.

    Entitlement
    There is no access limit for the base functionality, but additional licensing may be required for extended capabilities, such as linking to external supplier catalogs.

    License Consumption
    There are no limits to usage of this entitlement. It operates more like a standard scope item, but many of the functionalities that bring Ariba Buying Base to life will require additional licenses.

    Scope Item Relevance
    Scope item 4AI measures whether you've setup the communications arrangement required to use Ariba Buying base edition.

    More Information
    View an overview of Ariba Buying in this video demo - but note this video includes the utilization of catalogs that may require additional licensing.

    Key Adoption Notes
    Expertise Needed: BTP administrators and procurement experts are required for setup and catalog integration.
    Adoption Effort: Unclear
    Other Notes: A lot of the functionality’s value comes from adding catalogs and integrating with the broader Ariba Network, which may require additional licensing.

  10. Closing
    The intent of this blog was to give you a base understanding of the each entitlement in the base edition - what it is, and when it's most valuable.
    Any feedback regarding on the content including other use cases, other resources to link etc. are welcome and I'll periodically update this blog with improved information.

entry.title: Re: Connecting to a RAC Database in SAP Integration Suite: A Step-by-Step Guide Using JDBC Adapter
entry.content:
@David - When attempting to connect directly to the RAC database from SAP Integration Suite, we're encountering the following error

Issue :  The Network Adapter could not establish the connection.

entry.title: Re: xsls file from AL11 convert to internal table in SAP...
entry.content:
0.07 corresponds to 7.000000009E-2 because Excel stores the numbers as binary floating-point numbers in 8 bytes, hence it's unable to store exactly decimal numbers. Differently said, storing a decimal (base 10) number in a binary (base 2) number goes with imprecision for the decimals. There is also the limit of the number of significant digits.

You may transfer the number into a P variable with few decimals, that will round the number correctly.
